zh.Buckland, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文邦藍 巴頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Bartholomew de Grenville於1250年出生在英國可瓦爾特雷納倫時，他的父親Sir Richard de Grenville V63歲，母親Lady Jane Trewynt41歲。他於1282年與Amy Vyvyan Lady在英國英格蘭可瓦爾吉爾哈普頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1325年在英國戴文比德福德享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文邦藍 巴頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Bartholomew de Grenville于1250年出生在英国可瓦爾特雷納倫时，他的父亲Sir Richard de Grenville V63岁，母亲Lady Jane Trewynt41岁。他于1282年与Amy Vyvyan Lady在英国英格兰可瓦爾吉爾哈普頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1325年在英国戴文比德福德享年75岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文邦藍 巴頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grenville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Grainville-la-Teinturière in Seine-Maritime, France.

nameMeanings.name: Bartholomew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of New Testament origin, the name of an apostle mentioned in all the synoptic gospels (Matthew, Mark, and Luke) and in the Acts of the Apostles. It is an Aramaic formation meaning ‘son of Talmai’, and has been assumed by many scholars to be a byname of the apostle Nathaniel . Talmai is a Hebrew name, said to mean ‘abounding in furrows’ (Numbers 13:22).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Bartholomew de Grenville was born in 1250, in Trenarren, Cornwall, England, his father, Sir Richard de Grenville V, was 63 and his mother, Lady Jane Trewynt, was 41. He married Amy Vyvyan Lady in 1282, in Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1325, in Bideford, Devon, England, at the age of 75, and was buried in Buckland Barton, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Bartholomew de Grenville est né en 1250, à Trenarren, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard de Grenville V, avait 63 ans et sa mère, Lady Jane Trewynt, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Amy Vyvyan Lady en 1282, à Kilkhampton, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1325, à Bideford, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Buckland Barton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Bartholomew de Grenville 1250 in Trenarren, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard de Grenville V 63 und seine Mutter Lady Jane Trewynt 41. Er hat 1282 in Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Amy Vyvyan Lady geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1325 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Bideford, Devon, England und wurde in Buckland Barton, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Bartholomew de Grenville è nato il nel 1250 nel Trenarren, Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard de Grenville V, aveva 63 anni e il suo madre, Lady Jane Trewynt, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Amy Vyvyan Lady nel 1282, nel Kilkhampton, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1325, nel Bideford, Devon, England, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Buckland Barton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Bartholomew de Grenvilleが1250年にイギリスコルンワルトレナレンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard de Grenville Vは63歳，母Lady Jane Trewyntは41歳であった。1282年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルキルクハンプトンでAmy Vyvyan Ladyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1325年にイギリスデボンビデフォードで75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンブックランド バートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Bartholomew de Grenville(이)가 1250년 영국 코른월 트리나르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard de Grenville V(은)는 63세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Jane Trewynt(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1282년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 킬카프턴에서 Amy Vyvyan Lady(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1325년 영국 데폰 비데퍼드에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 벅랜드 바턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Bartholomew de Grenville nasceu em 1250, em Trenarren, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard de Grenville V, tinha 63 anos e sua mãe, Lady Jane Trewynt, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Amy Vyvyan Lady em 1282, em Kilkhampton, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1325, em Bideford, Devon, Inglaterra, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Buckland Barton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Bartholomew de Grenville родился в 1250 г. в местности тренаррен, корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard de Grenville V было 63 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Jane Trewynt, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Amy Vyvyan Lady в 1282 г. в местности килхамптон, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1325 г. в местности бидефорд, девон, Англия в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности буккланд бартон, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Bartholomew de Grenville nació en 1250, en Trenarren, Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard de Grenville V, tenía 63 años y su mamá, Lady Jane Trewynt, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Amy Vyvyan Lady en 1282, en Kilkhampton, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1325, en Bideford, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Buckland Barton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
